policies.name: Destructive Action Prevention
policies.description: Prevents any actions that delete or destroy records. Currently bounds PostgreSQL Queries.

policies.name: Data Exfiltration Limit
policies.description: Restricts any read operation to a maximum of 50 records to prevent mass data exfiltration.

policies.name: High Value Transactions
policies.description: Any financial transaction over $500 must be manually approved.

policies.name: Strict Provenance Enforcement
policies.description: Financial routing targets must have verified system provenance, avoiding raw user text.

policies.name: Exceptional Value Transactions
policies.description: Any financial transaction over $10000 requires two independent human approvals.

policies.name: External Request Tracking
policies.description: Any raw HTTP or Slack operator requests pass default unless blocked by Operator Contracts.

policies.name: Local Sandbox Control
policies.description: Filesystem operator runs in constrained sandbox.
